title: centaurea cardanica
intro: Centaurea cardanica, also known as a perennial thistle, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Centaurea cardanica can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to treat various health conditions.
